prompt: Create a vertical anime-style illustration of a cute young magical girl standing inside a cozy, cluttered antique magic shop. The character has very long flowing pastel pink hair with glossy strands and soft rim lighting, and her face is intentionally covered by a centered solid pastel pink square censor block. She wears an oversized pale pink zip-up hoodie with ribbed cuffs and hem, a large bow at the collar, a zipper pull shaped like a small charm, and a frilly translucent pink skirt peeking out underneath. Her pose is gentle and shy, one hand lifted near her cheek with delicate fingers, body angled slightly forward, soft moe proportions, dreamy magical-girl atmosphere. The setting is a warm wooden apothecary and relic shop packed with shelves of old books, glass potion bottles, glowing crystals, brass instruments, hanging lanterns, star charms, prisms, hourglasses, framed papers, and mystical trinkets. Include a small cute pink slime mascot on a lower shelf at the left. Add a chalkboard sign in the foreground reading Ancient Relics / Rarity / Magic Tools / and more.... Use warm golden lantern light mixed with pink highlights, detailed painterly anime rendering, high detail background, whimsical fantasy ambience, soft depth of field, sparkling glass reflections, vertical composition, polished gpt-image-2 aesthetic.
